svg.aria-label: A state observer fusing model and measurement. The model runs on the command and produces a predicted position; the machine produces a measured position; their difference times the observer gain L corrects the model states, a loop around the model. Estimated states including hidden velocity come out. Lower left: an estimate starting 50 mm wrong converges to true within about a second. Lower right: the gain trade-off, low gain smooth but slow, high gain fast but noisy, Kalman sets it optimally. Adding drifting parameters as states lets the observer track them.
svg.text: Run the model, correct it with the measurement — and read the states no sensor sees.
correction: nudge model states toward reality
Kalman filter sets L optimally · add params as states → track drift
